mounted_note: Rigidly mounted on graspable 'solve_puzzle_piece2'. RLBench re-places 'solve_puzzle_piece2' each episode at a random position within its spawn region and a random yaw (RLBench default +/-pi). This object sits ~0.0 m from 'solve_puzzle_piece2' rotation axis, so its absolute world position sweeps a wide ring; its pose relative to 'solve_puzzle_piece2' is fixed.
name: solve_puzzle_piece_visual2
